title: 'Netanyahu is driving Israel further away from its European and American allies than ever before'
subhead: The more wars Israel wages, the more isolated the country becomes, writes Le Monde's Gilles Paris in his column.

title: 'The gas shock feared at the start of the war in Iran has not materialized'
Second French peacekeeper dies after ambush blamed on Hezbollah
Ukraine's military chaplains bear witness to the hell of the front lines: 'Everyone started to believe in God after the first bombing'
subhead: Tested by four years of full-scale war, soldiers have found invaluable moral support from military chaplains. Faced with death and destruction on a daily basis, more and more of them have been seeking the presence of priests.

title: University of Strasbourg moves to expel international students over unpaid tuition
subhead: The university is preparing to drop around 40 master's students who have been unable to pay the nearly €4,000 increased tuition fees required of non-EU students. Few universities have enforced this measure. The government wants that to change.

title: French right-wing leader's call to ostracize Spain over migration policy sparks backlash
subhead: On Monday, Bruno Retailleau, the Les Républicains-backed candidate for France's 2027 presidential election, said he wanted to isolate Spain and its Socialist leader over a sweeping plan to regularize undocumented migrants.

title: Sealing the internet: How Putin wants to cut Russia off from the rest of the world
subhead: Controlling information has become a matter of survival for the Russian leader. Since 2019, he has sought to create a 'sovereign RuNet' under his control and cut off from the world. The technical implementation of this project has accelerated since the start of the war in Ukraine in 2022.

Neither war nor peace: Trump unilaterally extends ceasefire with Iran
subhead: The US president has not set a new deadline for Iran, instead waiting for the various political and security factions within the Iranian regime to reach a 'unified proposal.'

title: How Trump learned about the scale of Israel's devastating April 8 strikes on Lebanon
subhead: Emmanuel Macron, who wanted Lebanon to be included in the ceasefire reached in the war with Iran, informed the US president in a phone call of the scale of the deadly strikes on Beirut.

title: France's housing crisis is straining relations between landlords and tenants
subhead: Tensions have risen at every stage of the landlord-tenant relationship amid a nationwide housing shortage.
